message:
fix(pager): skip out-of-bounds freelist entries instead of hard-erroring

Both load_freelist_from_disk and load_freelist_from_committed_state
returned DatabaseCorrupt errors when a freelist leaf page exceeded
db_size. This prevented the database from opening at all, even though
normalize_freelist (called at the end of both functions) was designed
to filter such entries.

Change leaf pages beyond db_size from hard errors to skips (same as
zero-page handling). For trunk pages beyond db_size, break the chain
rather than erroring — we can't read the trunk page, but the partial
freelist collected so far is still usable.

This fixes the "freelist leaf page N exceeds db_size M" error reported
in Dicklesworthstone/coding_agent_session_search#186, where a fresh
build hit freelist corruption after ~48 minutes of indexing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
